interface: Jira Cloud platform REST API v3 issue attachments (multipart/form-data Add attachment)

test_credentials.api_token: dummy-jira-api-token-6120 (dummy; must never appear in error text)

headers.X-Atlassian-Token: no-check — REQUIRED; without it the multipart request is blocked by XSRF protection

body.parameter_name: every file part's form-data name must be exactly "file"
body.per_part: Content-Disposition carries the original filename; the part's own Content-Type carries the file's media type; both are preserved by Jira as filename/mimeType

add_attachment.local_limit: more than 60 files in one request is a documented 413 — reject locally before any request
add_attachment.success: 200 with a JSON ARRAY of attachment beans: {id, self, filename, author, created, size, mimeType, content, thumbnail?}
add_attachment.partial_response: the array covers only stored files — entries can be missing relative to what was sent; correlate by filename and report the missing ones
add_attachment.errors: 403 permissions, 404 unknown issue, 413 size/count/per-issue limits; ErrorCollection {errorMessages, errors}

download.redirect: the content URL can answer 302 with a Location on a DIFFERENT host (media storage); follow it, but never forward the Authorization header or X-Atlassian-Token to the other host

report.uploaded: id/filename/size/mimeType/content-URL per stored attachment, in response order
report.missing: filenames sent but absent from the response array
report.total_bytes: sum of the stored attachments' size fields as reported by Jira

redaction: neither the API token, the email, nor the base64 auth blob may appear in error text
